source_files.main.spy:
from vehicle import Vehicle
from car_module import ElectricCar, Electric

def main():
    car = ElectricCar("Nissan", 350)
    print(car.brand)
    print(car.range_km)
    
    description: str = car.describe()
    print(description)
    
    ev: Electric = car
    level: int = ev.charge_level()
    print(level)
    
    vehicle: Vehicle = car
    print(vehicle.describe())
